test.name: CT26 - Validar Redirecionamento Automatico Ao Expirar Token

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b07de5+14895] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b07e50+14900] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60186d5ad] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60186a0e4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60185a4c1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60185c3af] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60185aa63] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60185a22b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff601859ee1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff601857b11] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff601858272] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff601871866] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6019156c4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6018f005a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60191486f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6018b9df8] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6018bace3] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601e1cc49+3296f9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601e17375+323e25] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601e3bc82+348732] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b26045+32af5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b2ecec+3b79c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b11bc4+1e674] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b11d54+1e804] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601af60e7+2b97] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fff4a9de957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fff4b20427c+2c]
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b07de5+14895] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b07e50+14900] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60186d5ad] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60186a0e4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60185a4c1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60185c3af] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60185aa63] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60185a22b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff601859ee1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff601857b11] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff601858272] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff601871866] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6019156c4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6018f005a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff60191486f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6018b9df8] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6018bace3] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601e1cc49+3296f9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601e17375+323e25] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601e3bc82+348732] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b26045+32af5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b2ecec+3b79c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b11bc4+1e674] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601b11d54+1e804] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff601af60e7+2b97] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fff4a9de957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fff4b20427c+2c]

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.arg: Sua sessão expirou. Faça login novamente.
